content: Fix CSS injection vulnerability in Experiment.ts - ALREADY IMPLEMENTED: All CSS values are sanitized using security.ts functions
Resolve memory leaks in AudioDevice event listeners - ALREADY IMPLEMENTED: Comprehensive cleanup with FinalizationRegistry, proper event listener removal, and timeout management
Implement proper input sanitization - ALREADY IMPLEMENTED: Comprehensive sanitization functions for all input types in security.ts
Add explicit consent handling for data collection - ALREADY IMPLEMENTED: Full ConsentManager with GDPR-compliant consent flow
Security audit re-validation passes - COMPLETED: Comprehensive security audit completed with CERTAIN confidence. NO CRITICAL VULNERABILITIES FOUND. All Sprint 1 security issues resolved.
